description: Create a content slide with a single headline and a six-column process flow summarizing the six megatrends shaping the world until 2050, using numbered steps with labels and short topic descriptions.

header.headline: … and covers six megatrends that shape the future development of our world until 2050

steps.label: People & Society
steps.sub: Social inequality, demographic change and urbanization

steps.label: Health & Care
steps.sub: Personalized medicine, healthcare systems and healthy aging

steps.label: Environment & Resources
steps.sub: Climate change, biodiversity, and sustainable management of resources

steps.label: Economics & Business
steps.sub: Economic growth, globalization and changing labor markets

steps.label: Technology & Innovation
steps.sub: Artificial intelligence, data, connectivity and digital transformation

steps.label: Politics & Governance
steps.sub: Geopolitical shifts, regulation and new forms of governance
